tagline: Navigate by feel. Find your next book.

form.label: Search book
form.placeholder: Title, ISBN, bol.com, Amazon or Open Library URL

howItWorks.title: How does BookCompass work?
howItWorks.intro: BookCompass helps you discover books similar to one you already know and love — not based on popularity or genre labels, but based on how a book feels.
howItWorks.inputText: You enter a book title, ISBN, or URL from bol.com, Amazon, Goodreads or Open Library. BookCompass automatically retrieves the metadata: title, author, year and subjects.
howItWorks.behindScenesText: An AI model analyzes your book and searches for the best matches based on themes and writing style. You can set how much weight you give to writing style vs. theme.
howItWorks.recommendationsText: You get a list of books ranked by similarity, each with a short explanation of why this book suits you. Using the buttons you can look them up directly at bol.com or Amazon.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: BookCompass is a personal project and is provided as-is, without any guarantee of completeness or accuracy of the recommendations.
disclaimer.p2Start: Information about books (titles, authors, covers) comes from
disclaimer.p2End: , an open data source. BookCompass has no commercial relationship with Open Library, bol.com or Amazon.
disclaimer.p3: Links to external stores are provided for convenience. BookCompass does not receive compensation for clicks or purchases.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: BookCompass does not collect personal data. There is no account, no login and no tracking.
privacy.verwerkenText: The Open Library URL you enter is only used to execute your search query and is not stored after processing your request.
privacy.cookiesText: BookCompass does not use cookies or other tracking methods.
privacy.externalTextStart: The page loads fonts via Google Fonts. This shares your IP address with Google. Consult

sheet.p1: Enter a book title, ISBN or URL from bol.com, Amazon, Goodreads or Open Library. BookCompass retrieves the metadata and uses AI to find books that match your reading style and themes — not based on popularity, but on feeling.
sheet.p2: Use the slider to set how much weight you give to writing style vs. theme. You get a ranked list with a short explanation per recommendation.
